variants.title: Teal Masthead
variants.blurb: Full-width teal header band, white Clash name, clean single-column body.

variants.title: Ink Sidebar
variants.blurb: Dark charcoal left rail for contact and skills; light main column for experience.

variants.title: Swiss Rules
variants.blurb: Ultra-minimal black/white with hairline rules and oversized Clash Display name.

variants.title: Forest Rail
variants.blurb: Deep green left accent rail, refined single column, muted sage chips.

variants.title: Coral Timeline
variants.blurb: Vertical timeline experience with coral markers and warm charcoal type.

variants.title: Asymmetric Split
variants.blurb: Wide Clash name left, stacked contact right, then two-column skills/experience.

variants.title: Slate Bands
variants.blurb: Soft slate section bands (not cards), strong section labels in Clash Display.

variants.title: Mono Bold
variants.blurb: High-contrast black and white, mega Clash type, dense modern hierarchy.

variants.title: Ocean Wash
variants.blurb: Cool blue header wash into white body, airy spacing, navy accents.

variants.title: Geometric Mark
variants.blurb: Large Clash monogram mark, modern portfolio layout with accent underlines.
